log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Aarakocra — Bardic Musician.
→ Aarakocra — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 20] FAIL! 29 necrotic damage. HP: 38/67
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aarakocra — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:7+12=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 fire damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 22/67
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aarakocra — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:17+12=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 fire damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aarakocra — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aarakocra — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:6+12=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 fire damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 4/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 0 remaining).
→ Aarakocra — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aarakocra — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:10+12=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 fire damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: -13/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 6 rounds ===
